testcase.name: Monetization.tsx page structure > has 100+ lines (stub replaced)
Monetization.tsx page structure > uses StepForm with stepKey step4b
Monetization.tsx page structure > imports and uses MonetizationInputSchema
Monetization.tsx page structure > calls trpc.monetization.generate.useMutation
Monetization.tsx URL state + localStorage (AC-3) > uses useSearchParams for URL state
Monetization.tsx URL state + localStorage (AC-3) > uses getToolLsKey for monetization draft LS key
Monetization.tsx URL state + localStorage (AC-3) > persists done state to URL (?done=1)
Monetization.tsx result display > renders StepResult with stepKey step4b
Monetization.tsx result display > StepResult step4b renders currentAnalysis ladder revenueStructure successCases
Monetization.tsx result display > supports onRetry to clear result
MonetizationInputSchema schema > monetization.schema.ts exports MonetizationInputSchema
MonetizationInputSchema schema > MonetizationInputSchema re-exports Step4bInputSchema fields
MonetizationInputSchema schema > monetization router generate procedure exists
MonetizationInputSchema schema > monetization router registered in app router
PresentStyles.tsx page structure > has 80+ lines (stub replaced)
PresentStyles.tsx page structure > has textarea for 文案内容
PresentStyles.tsx page structure > has platform select (平台)
PresentStyles.tsx page structure > calls trpc.presentStyles.recommend.useMutation
PresentStyles.tsx URL state + localStorage (AC-3) > uses useSearchParams for URL state
PresentStyles.tsx URL state + localStorage (AC-3) > uses getToolLsKey for presentStyles draft LS key
PresentStyles.tsx URL state + localStorage (AC-3) > persists text and platform to URL params
PresentStyles.tsx style cards display (AC-2) > shows 图文/短视频/直播口播/长图文/漫画 style types
PresentStyles.tsx style cards display (AC-2) > shows result container after submission
PresentStyles.tsx style cards display (AC-2) > has example text in style cards
PresentStyles.tsx style cards display (AC-2) > supports 重新分析 retry button
PresentStylesInputSchema schema > text < 10 chars → zod fail with Chinese error
PresentStylesInputSchema schema > valid input → zod pass
PresentStylesInputSchema schema > invalid platform → zod fail
PresentStylesInputSchema schema > presentStyles router registered in app router
PresentStylesInputSchema schema > presentStyles router has recommend procedure
PresentStylesInputSchema schema > presentStyles.schema.ts defines PRESENT_STYLE_TYPES with 5 types
